NF0A3LH4: The North Face DryVent Rain Jacket is the region's favorite serious gift — 120 separate orders through our shop. Genuinely waterproof, unmistakably The North Face, and embroidered with your logo opposite the half-dome it becomes the company jacket people brag about. The Northwest's rain makes the case for you.
NF0A7V64: The Skyline Full-Zip Fleece posted the most remarkable pattern in our records: 110 units across 108 separate orders. That's an executive and new-hire gift bought deliberately, one at a time, over and over. Soft mid-weight fleece, the half-dome on the chest, your mark on the other side.
NF0A8BUS: The Double-Knit Full-Zip Hoodie is The North Face as everyday wear — a refined knit hoodie that reads athleisure rather than expedition. Companies gift it when a fleece feels expected; the smooth face carries embroidery beautifully.
NF0A3LGZ: The Ridgewall Soft Shell Vest is the layering piece of the TNF corporate line — 46 separate orders, mostly leadership gifts. Wind-blocking stretch with the half-dome at the chest; your embroidered logo makes it company issue.
NF0A529A: The Everyday Insulated Vest is The North Face's quilted core-warmth layer — 34 separate orders here, the steady drumbeat of a proven gift. Light insulation, clean lines, and instant brand recognition on sight.
NF0A3LGT: The Apex Barrier Soft Shell is the flagship jacket of TNF's corporate program — wind-stopping stretch with the label that needs no explanation. Thirty-three orders, most in ones and twos: the pattern of a considered gift.
NF0A7V63: The Skyline 1/2-Zip Fleece is the pullover cut of our most-gifted North Face piece — same soft fleece, collar-up convenience. Teams gift the full-zip to some and the half-zip to others; the embroidery matches across both.
NF0A8BUD: The Barr Lake Soft Shell is The North Face's insulated soft shell — warmth and weather resistance in the brand's clean corporate styling. A cold-season upgrade pick for companies already gifting TNF.
NF0A3LH5: The Women's DryVent Rain Jacket is the tailored cut of our most-ordered North Face piece — genuinely waterproof, properly fitted, 31 separate orders. Gift programs that include both cuts always land better; the embroidery matches the men's exactly.
NF0A3LH1: The Women's Ridgewall Soft Shell Vest completes the TNF vest program in a real women's fit — 26 separate orders. Same wind-blocking stretch, same half-dome, tailored through the body.
NF0A529Q: The Women's Everyday Insulated Vest posted 39 separate orders of 54 units — bought one and two at a time as deliberate gifts. TNF's quilted layering piece in a tailored cut; embroidery rides the chest cleanly.
NF0A7RGH: The Circular Rib Beanie brings the half-dome to winter — The North Face's ribbed knit at a price that works as a crew gift. Nearly 150 decorated; the cuff takes a small embroidered logo beside the brand's own.
EB532: The Shaded Crosshatch Soft Shell is our best-selling Eddie Bauer — nearly 500 embroidered, at $17,000 of gross profit. The crosshatch texture photographs premium, the soft shell handles Northwest weather, and the Seattle-born label means something here. A left-chest logo finishes it like an executive gift.
EB550: The Eddie Bauer Rain Jacket carries a Seattle rain pedigree that predates everyone else on this page — 35 separate orders here. Genuinely rain-ready, clean corporate styling, and a brand your Northwest customers grew up with.
EB546: The Stretch Soft Shell Vest is Eddie Bauer's layering piece — nearly 200 embroidered across 21 orders. Stretch comfort, core warmth, and a heritage label that reads quality without shouting. A staple of our gift-tier programs.
EB510: The Quilted Jacket posted 83 separate orders of 110 units — the one-at-a-time pattern of a gift people choose on purpose. Diamond quilting, heritage badge, tailored fit; it's the refined alternative to a puffy.
EB514: The Packable Quilted Full-Zip stuffs into its own pocket — Eddie Bauer warmth that lives behind a truck seat or in a carry-on. Companies gift it to travel-heavy teams; the quilted chest takes embroidery cleanly.
EB228: The Woodland Shirt Jac is the piece that surprised us — 64 separate orders of 85 units, almost all individual picks. It's the flannel-jacket hybrid everyone's wearing, done by a brand that's been making Northwest outdoor gear for a century.
EB751: The Quilted Insulated Fleece Blanket is Eddie Bauer as a gift you keep on the couch — quilted one side, fleece the other, heritage badge in the corner next to your embroidered logo. Client-gift programs order it every holiday season.
EB656: The WeatherEdge 3-in-1 is the full system — waterproof shell, zip-out liner, three configurations from one hanger. It's the top-tier jacket gift in our Eddie Bauer lineup, for companies that want one gesture to cover every season.
BB18412: The Brooks Brothers Washable Merino Birdseye 1/4-Zip is the dressiest knit we stock — real merino, machine-washable, with a label that has dressed boardrooms for two centuries. It's the partner-and-principal tier of gift programs; small tonal embroidery only.
BB18000: The Wrinkle-Free Stretch Pinpoint Shirt is Brooks Brothers' working dress shirt — the pinpoint oxford that steps off a red-eye looking pressed. Firms order it embroidered with a small cuff-or-chest mark for client-facing teams.
BB18413: The Women's Washable Merino Cardigan brings Brooks Brothers' knitwear pedigree to a company gift — real merino, real tailoring, machine-washable practicality. It took a 76-unit order almost immediately; leadership programs are the natural fit.
BB18006: The Tech Stretch Patterned Shirt is Brooks Brothers gone modern — subtle pattern, four-way stretch, dress-shirt polish. Twenty-eight separate orders; it's the shirt for firms whose uniform is 'dress well.'
DM130: The District Perfect Tri Tee is the softest volume seller we print — 1,200 units at a 75% margin. Tri-blend drape, heathered retail color, and a surface DTG and soft-hand screen prints love. When a brand says 'we want shirts people actually wear,' this is the answer.
DT6100: The V.I.T. Fleece Hoodie is District's retail-soft hoodie — over 1,100 decorated here. It's the hoodie for brands that skew young: soft face, clean drape, none of the boxy uniform look. Prints beautifully, embroiders cleanly.
DM108: The Perfect Blend CVC Tee runs a 79% margin and a soft heathered hand — District's everyday retail tee at a price that works for events and merch tables alike. Six hundred printed here; it's the value end of the boutique-tee wall.
DT2101: The District Wash Tee arrives pre-washed and broken-in — garment-dyed character in a boxy modern cut. Over 800 moved in a handful of merch runs; it's the tee for coffee roasters, taprooms, and brands selling a vibe.
DT137L: The Women's Perfect Tri Rocker Tank is the merch-table staple — District's softest tri-blend in a relaxed racerback. Two hundred fifty-plus printed for gyms, events, and retail lines; soft-hand prints keep the drape.
BC3001: The BELLA+CANVAS 3001 is the retail tee — the shirt behind half the band merch and startup swag in America, and 2,300-plus prints in our shop. Combed cotton smoothness, a fit people photograph themselves in, and the widest boutique color wall in the catalog. DTG loves it.
BC3739: The Sponge Fleece Full-Zip Hoodie is BELLA+CANVAS's famously soft zip — 35 separate orders, mostly brands upgrading from commodity fleece. Light, drapey, retail through and through; a small chest embroidery or soft print suits it best.
NL6210: The Next Level CVC Tee blends the brand's famous softness with heathered CVC color — 538 printed at a 75% margin. It's the step between a value tee and full tri-blend: retail feel, roster-friendly price.
NL6211: The Next Level CVC Long Sleeve carries the soft heathered formula into covered-arm season — 24 separate orders. Merch lines and staff programs order it alongside the short-sleeve NL6210 with one artwork run.
8000: The Gildan DryBlend Tee moved 1,100-plus units here at a 71% margin — the value workhorse with a moisture-wicking assist. It's the event and crew shirt when quantity is the mission; prints hold bright on the 50/50 face.
G2400: The Ultra Cotton Long Sleeve is Gildan's heavyweight LS staple — 440-plus printed across 15 orders. Dense cotton, full coverage, event-scale pricing. Fall fundraisers and crew orders keep it in rotation.
5000: The Gildan Heavy Cotton Tee runs the best margin in our tee wall — 84% — and remains the giveaway classic that started a thousand print shops. When the job is maximum shirts per dollar with a clean bold print, the 5000 answers.
P170: The Hanes EcoSmart Pullover Hoodie moved nearly 1,200 units here in big-batch runs — the value hoodie with a recycled-content story. Events, fundraisers, and full-crew orders pick it when the budget matters and the print still has to look good.
5180: The Hanes Beefy-T earned its name and its decades — a dense, heavyweight cotton tee that outlasts trends and wash cycles. Three hundred-plus printed here; it's the heritage heavyweight for brands that want substance.
996M: The Jerzees NuBlend Pullover Hoodie is the fundraiser workhorse — 762 units here at a price that keeps school and event margins healthy. The NuBlend fleece pills less than its price suggests, and prints sit clean on it.
995M: The NuBlend 1/4-Zip Cadet Collar Sweatshirt is the sleeper of the value fleece wall — quarter-zip styling at a sweatshirt price. Nearly 200 decorated; teams get the collar-up look without the quarter-zip budget.
29LS: The Jerzees Dri-Power Long Sleeve extends our safety-color workhorse into full coverage — the 50/50 blend that manages sweat and survives industrial wash. Crews order it alongside the short-sleeve 29M in the same colors.
S700: The Champion Powerblend Hoodie brings a heritage athletic label to the everyday hoodie — the C logo on the sleeve does quiet work your logo benefits from. Twelve orders here; it's the brand-name option at a mid-tier price.
MM1014: The Mercer+Mettle Stretch Jersey Polo is the modern professional's polo — a smooth stretch jersey that drapes like knitwear, not uniform pique. Two hundred-plus embroidered; boutique hotels, agencies, and front-of-house teams pick it.
A4N3165: The A4 Cooling Performance Long Sleeve is the practice-and-crew staple — light, cooling, sized for team budgets. Two hundred fifty printed here in a few quick runs; leagues and summer crews are the regulars.
VL100: The Volunteer Knitwear All-American Tee posted 81 separate orders — customers pick it deliberately for its stitched-in-the-USA story. Grown and made in America, heavyweight and honest, and it prints beautifully. When the client asks for American-made, this is our first answer.
